result.stdout:
Alethic SQL Server Deployment Tool
Copyright 2021 Jerome Haltom

Execute SQL Server Deployment

Usage: Alethic.SqlServer.Deployment.Tool deploy [options] <manifest> <target(s) to execute>

Arguments:
  manifest               deployment manifest file
  target(s) to execute   

Options:
  -a|--argument <value>  argument to pass to deployment (<name>=<value>)
  -?|-h|--help           Show help information.
